reviews.comment:
Ahora es una estación de servicios peor que cualquiera. Está en refacción hace muchísimo y el café que había no está.

(Translated by Google)
Now it's a gas station worse than any other. It's been under renovation for ages, and the coffee shop that used to be there is gone.

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar un día que la app tenía promo y no les andaba, aceptaban solo efectivo o tarjeta. Cuando pregunté si cargaban los puntos de serviclub tampoco los podían cargar.

(Translated by Google)
I went to top up my card one day when the app had a promotion, but it wasn't working; they only accepted cash or card. When I asked if they could add Serviclub points, they couldn't add those either.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCb2JYQ09BEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Muchos empleados, no hay que esperar. Muy fácil acceso. Una buena cafetería. Lugar para estacionar. Perfecto!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Plenty of staff, no waiting. Very easy access. A nice coffee shop. Parking available. Perfect!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCb2RTMVZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Hay reformas en la estación iy eso lleva a que haya un poco de congestión  pero es para destacar que los baños estan siempre limpios.

(Translated by Google)
There are renovations at the station and that leads to some congestion, but it is worth noting that the bathrooms are always clean.
